name: Butterscotch Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add brown sugar and stir until it melts completely.
3. Heat the mixture to boiling point.
4. Gradually add white sugar, sour cream, and salt while stirring constantly.
5. Cook the mixture until it reaches 236°F (112°C) on a candy thermometer.
6. Remove from heat and let it cool down.
7. Stir in vanilla extract and nuts.
8. Beat the mixture until it thickens.
9. Pour the fudge into a buttered pan and allow it to set completely before cutting into squares.
